hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -Eq '(^|[^a-zA-Z0-9_])rm[[:space:]]+(-[a-zA-Z]*[rf][a-zA-Z]*)+[[:space:]]+(/|~|\$HOME)|git[[:space:]]+push[[:space:]]+.*--force.*\b(main|master)\b|git[[:space:]]+push[[:space:]]+--force[[:space:]]+.*\b(main|master)\b|(cat|less|more|head|tail|bat|source|\.)[[:space:]]+[^[:space:]]*\.env\b' && { echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Blocked destructive command (rm -rf on /, ~, or $HOME; force-push to main; or reading/sourcing .env). Review before running."}'; exit 0; } || exit 0
